objective: Secure the mission terms and understand what Vautrin really wants
opposition: Vautrin uses Elise's mother's bills and her deniable status as leverage
turn: Elise realizes the assignment is meant to justify a larger dragnet, not a precise arrest
consequence_cost: She accepts a job she already distrusts because refusal would abandon her mother and herself

objective: Gain entry to the quarry contact chain under the Jeanne Morel alias
opposition: An early police arrest shreds the planned handoff and leaves Clemence suspicious
turn: The courier is taken and Elise improvises her cover in motion
consequence_cost: She wins shelter only by letting another operative-contact disappear into custody

objective: Map the refuge while pretending merely to settle in
opposition: Sensory disorientation and communal kindness make detached observation harder
turn: Lucie assumes Elise can help with lessons and folds her into supper
consequence_cost: Elise's target set acquires texture, appetite, and childhood

objective: Identify the leader and test how dangerous he is
opposition: Lucien notices false notes in Elise's story without exposing her publicly
turn: He invites her deeper into the schoolroom instead of keeping her at the margin
consequence_cost: She must keep lying face to face to a man who treats her as teachable

objective: Send the first report without burning her new cover
opposition: Dead-drop surveillance risk and her own reluctance narrow what she can say
turn: Elise deliberately leaves out Clemence and Lucie
consequence_cost: Vautrin receives useful intelligence but not the full human map he wants

objective: Get Clemence and Lucie through a sudden sweep near the laundry yard
opposition: Police vans close the street and panic spreads faster than orders
turn: Elise moves them through the gap with instincts too polished for her cover
consequence_cost: Clemence begins noticing that Jeanne reacts like someone trained to read raids

objective: Keep Vautrin satisfied after the thin report
opposition: Vautrin hears the omission in the report's shape even without proof
turn: He widens the sweep rather than waiting for better evidence
consequence_cost: Elise's first lie produces more arrests elsewhere in the city

objective: Find evidence of operational planning in the print room
opposition: Abel resents scrutiny and the room is full of ordinary labor rather than weapons
turn: Elise finds ration lists, primers, and relief broadsides instead of an attack plan
consequence_cost: Her assumptions about the quarry's purpose begin to erode

objective: Test Ferrand the moment he enters the refuge's orbit
opposition: Ferrand is charming enough to pass, and Lucien hates paranoia for its own sake
turn: Ferrand names powder and fuses before anyone asks about them
consequence_cost: Elise identifies him as the real destabilizer but cannot expose why she knows it

objective: Learn whether the May Day threat is real
opposition: A communal meeting splits between Lucien's restraint and Ferrand's appetite for spectacle
turn: Abel publicly aligns himself with Ferrand's rhetoric
consequence_cost: The ideological disagreement becomes a practical risk with a willing young instrument

objective: Decide what to do with the cache ledger before Vautrin demands it
opposition: Fear of being searched competes with fear of helping the police too far
turn: Elise hides the ledger in a quarry niche instead of turning it over
consequence_cost: She begins actively interfering with her own assignment and loses clean deniability

objective: Use wash day to study Lucien and the others aboveground
opposition: Ordinary ease and humor loosen the distance Elise depends on
turn: Clemence relaxes enough to tease Lucie and share chores without guard-talk
consequence_cost: Elise finds herself enjoying a world she entered to dismantle

objective: Push Lucien into revealing what the quarry means to him
opposition: Lucien listens closely enough to hear where Elise's invented life frays
turn: He tells her how the refuge grew from evictions, prison visits, and old maps
consequence_cost: Elise nearly says her own name and leaves the scene more compromised than before

objective: Deliver paper and money to a print runner without drawing notice
opposition: Vautrin's men strike early, Ferrand vanishes, and the room collapses into panic
turn: Nadir chooses to drag an injured runner instead of saving the bundle
consequence_cost: The job is blown and Elise's side knowledge is suddenly dangerous

objective: Preserve cover after the raid by destroying her reporting tools
opposition: Losing the slips will cut her off from official channels she may still need
turn: Elise burns the cipher slips in an alley drain while Clemence watches from a distance
consequence_cost: She is stranded between sides with no safe way back to routine obedience

objective: Count who and what is left after the raid
opposition: Grief, hunger, and blame make every tally feel accusatory
turn: Lucien cannot decide whose absence hurts most and stalls the room
consequence_cost: The commune sees how badly leadership falters under domestic scarcity

objective: Rebuild a minimal survival plan
opposition: Clemence will not trust the cash and papers to anyone lightly
turn: Elise volunteers to carry the reserve funds and forged documents to a new cache
consequence_cost: She becomes physically entangled in the commune's survival rather than merely observing it

objective: Learn what Vautrin and Ferrand are planning now
opposition: Risk of recognition and Vautrin's scrutiny make re-entry into police space dangerous
turn: Elise finds payment records and draft warrants showing Ferrand is meant to manufacture a bomb case
consequence_cost: She now knows silence could make her complicit in a massacre-by-paper

objective: Warn Lucien without exposing her full role
opposition: Telling the whole truth would detonate her cover before the commune is ready to hear it
turn: Elise names Ferrand as danger and presses for moving the press
consequence_cost: Her warning helps, but Lucien still lacks the source logic that would let him judge her fully

objective: Get the hand press and records into a safer chamber
opposition: The load is awkward, the passages are narrow, and trust is frayed
turn: Elise takes the front lift when others hesitate and helps save the type cases
consequence_cost: She earns practical credibility at the cost of exhaustion and deeper investment

objective: Decide whether to stop at comradeship or cross into desire
opposition: Their mutual secrecy and the night's fatigue make intimacy morally dangerous
turn: Lucien and Elise have sex after the move, with no clean line between comfort and surrender
consequence_cost: Their attachment becomes bodily evidence against every abstraction either has lived by

objective: Get Nadir through a routine delivery without incident
opposition: Police pick him up in public and Ferrand seems unsurprised
turn: Nadir is taken before Elise can intervene
consequence_cost: The commune loses its steadiest practical intelligence and its best compositor

objective: Keep the arrest from becoming a call for spectacle
opposition: Ferrand turns Nadir's seizure into propaganda and Lucien's restraint reads as weakness
turn: Abel sees that Ferrand's satchel is unattended and that nobody can stop him by argument alone
consequence_cost: The room fractures into grief, blame, and dangerous opportunity

objective: Find Abel before he leaves with the explosives
opposition: Time is gone, Lucie overhears too much, and no one trusts the same facts
turn: Abel vanishes with the gelignite and pistol
consequence_cost: What was political debate becomes a countdown with a moving target

objective: Search the city for Abel before night falls
opposition: False leads, market crowds, and ordinary amusements keep swallowing time
turn: A bookseller points them toward the old tollhouse route Abel used as a courier
consequence_cost: Hours are lost and dusk turns the search into dread

objective: Hold the search together long enough to think clearly
opposition: Truth and affection press against each other more urgently than strategy
turn: Lucien admits he knows Elise has lied and chooses not to force confession tonight
consequence_cost: The mercy deepens the harm his later discovery will carry

objective: Talk Abel down and keep Ferrand from triggering the explosives
opposition: Abel wants martyrdom and Ferrand wants a usable blast, not a clean escape
turn: Ferrand reaches for the fuse as Abel points the gun at Elise
consequence_cost: Words fail and the conflict narrows to bodies in a room

objective: Reduce the blast radius once talk fails
opposition: Unstable gelignite, a cramped cellar, and incoming police make precision impossible
turn: Elise grapples Abel off the crowded approach, but the explosives still detonate
consequence_cost: Abel and Ferrand die, Elise is injured, and Vautrin gets the outrage he needed

objective: Learn what story the city now believes
opposition: Pain, shock, and scarce information distort every conversation
turn: News arrives that Nadir supposedly died in an escape attempt and the papers hail a conspiracy
consequence_cost: The survivors understand they are already being rewritten in public

objective: Tend Elise's torn dress and wounds without collapsing the room
opposition: Clemence must keep Lucie calm while suspicion gnaws at her
turn: A hidden Surete marker slips from Elise's hem into Clemence's hand
consequence_cost: Suspicion hardens into certainty and silence becomes an active choice

objective: Get ahead of exposure by speaking before Clemence does
opposition: Clemence has proof and no reason to grant mercy
turn: Elise admits her true name and mission under pressure
consequence_cost: Private trust between the two women is destroyed beyond repair

objective: Decide whether to return to Vautrin for safety
opposition: Poverty, blackmail, and the possibility of saving her mother make the offer real
turn: Vautrin demands the quarry map and a clean statement about Lucien; Elise burns her last report instead
consequence_cost: Her official life ends and she loses the only institutional protection she had

objective: Face Lucien once the truth can no longer be staged around
opposition: Lucien is grieving Abel and Nadir while learning his lover was his assigned infiltrator
turn: He cannot deny Elise saved lives, but he refuses to keep her inside the refuge's inner rooms
consequence_cost: Elise loses the commune at the same moment she loses the state

objective: Understand the police move before the quarry seals shut
opposition: Smoke at the entrances and bad maps turn the refuge into a trap
turn: Lucien realizes the drainage route is the only path left for civilians
consequence_cost: Time collapses and the home becomes a hazard

objective: Get Lucie and the other noncombatants through the drainage passage
opposition: Mud, floodwater, and mistrust make Elise the last person anyone wants to follow
turn: Elise gets the children and weaker adults through first
consequence_cost: She earns necessary obedience from people who still hate needing her

objective: Delay the police long enough for the evacuation to hold
opposition: Lucien's lungs are failing and Vautrin's cordon is closing
turn: Lucien stays behind with false papers and is captured as part of the quarry is sealed
consequence_cost: The refuge is lost and Elise is separated from Lucien by force rather than choice

objective: Test whether there is any survivable bargain left with the state
opposition: Vautrin makes future care for Elise's mother contingent on false testimony
turn: He reveals the bills have already lapsed and offers restoration only at the price of Lucien's story
consequence_cost: Elise must choose between material rescue and the last shred of truth

objective: See Lucien once without lies between them
opposition: Prison procedure, Lucien's failing body, and the absence of forgiveness constrict the visit
turn: Lucien gives Elise the notebook of true names and dates and asks for witness, not rescue
consequence_cost: She leaves with duty instead of absolution and no path back to either old life

objective: Decide whether exposing Ferrand's payments is worth the risk
opposition: Lucien's death in custody makes the truth feel too late to matter and the survivors remain vulnerable
turn: A sympathetic printer agrees to run the records beside the names of the dead
consequence_cost: The official case is stained, but nobody is restored

objective: Settle what can be settled and leave Paris
opposition: Money is scarce, her mother cannot be fully rescued, and no name feels fully hers
turn: Elise pays one last month of care and disappears with the notebook copied into her own hand
consequence_cost: She chooses witness over belonging and accepts exile without redemption
